title: Blue Canyon Gecko Corner Rack, Shower Caddy with Vacuum Suction, Quick Lock Suction Cup, No Drill and No Screws Required, Removable, Reusable and Repositionable, Stainless Steel
features: [ PREMIUM MATERIAL ]: This Corner Rack is made of high-quality stainless steel materials and can remain intact for years, even in humid environments. Quick drying keeps bath products clean to prevent bacteria growth. This stainless-steel bathroom basket is removable and easy to clean.

[ EASY INSTALLATION ]: The Gecko Quick Lock suction cup is a unique vacuum lock system; it only requires a 60-degree turn to be securely fixed to the surface. This Corner rack is completely reusable and can be repositioned as needed leaving no holes or marks. Our Gecko Corner rack never rusts or flakes.

[ MULTI-FUNCTIONAL ]: This powerful suction cup holder is perfect for a bathroom and kitchen storage organizer, such as soap, sponges, and loofahs. Our Corner rack is removable, allowing easy removal without leaving marks or sticky residue.

[ CONTEMPORARY DESIGN ]: The voguish wire rack with wire design drains the excess moisture and gives your bathroom a modern and aesthetic look. Thanks to its Stainless-steel finish, this suction Corner rack is perfect around your bathroom sink and looks fantastic in the kitchen too.

[ REUSABLE & VERSATILE ]: The Gecko Stainless-Steel Corner rack is reusable, and when repositioned, it leaves no holes or marks. This shower wire rack is part of our wider range of shower baskets, including something to suit the bathroom's shape and size.
